mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tasks (title, description, status, priority) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, status, priority FROM tasks
SELECT id, title, description, status, priority FROM tasks WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT id, title, description, status, priority FROM tasks WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tasks SET status = NULL WHERE status = #{columnId}
